facebook.caption: Tourists keep walking past this bakery. Locals on Đ. 30 Tháng 4 don't want you to find it. THU HIỀN BAKERY sits quietly in Khu 1 with a 4.6-star rating and 81 reviews from people who live here, not people on resort packages. Fresh baked goods, local prices, zero tourist markup. This is the real Phu Quoc morning routine. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
